label: Flow A — Ingest & Store
info:
Receives sensor messages from MQTT and writes them to InfluxDB.
Topics: bike/+/gps, bike/+/imu, bike/+/status, station/+/status

label: Flow B — Fall Detection
info: Monitors IMU data for sudden acceleration spikes that indicate a fall.

label: Flow C — Parking Violation
info: Detects stationary bikes parked outside authorized zones.

label: Flow D — Battery & Dock Events
info: Monitors battery levels and dock/undock events.

name: Prepare GPS for InfluxDB
Prepare IMU for InfluxDB
Prepare Status for InfluxDB
Prepare Station for InfluxDB
Detect Fall (|accel_z| > 25)
Detect Unauthorized Parking
Check Low Battery (< 15%)
